Position/Role: Hi, my name is Makenna! I'm 19 and I am from Melbourne Florida (currently living in SO Cal though) My personality is laid back, funny, patient, kind, mature, but can be authoritative when necessary. I love the outdoors, pets, and live a healthy lifestyle. I respect the decisions of the parent and am always willing to follow the rules set for your children. I've watched many kids from newborn-13yrs old, I have been a nanny for several families and also was a nanny for 2 special needs children for over a year,  I have worked with children on many mission trips, I was also a summer camp counselor for 2 months! Babysitting is something that just comes naturally to me now. I'm energetic and outgoing and am willing to take the kids out to play, swimming/beach day, go to the park, go for a walk, to the zoo, run errands, help with homework, cook and do light house cleaning. I also am CPR/First aid certified and have taken classes on early childhood development!  I hope to meet you and hangout with your kiddos! I also have 6 siblings all younger but one so I am used to being around children and caring for them :) I was recently a nanny over the summer and now I am a live in nanny in Southern California? I am currently looking for a live in nanny job  that will not start until mid year 2021 I am willing to drive whatever the distance to move. I will bring my vehicle so I will have my own transportation while there! Feel free to message me through this app or text me 803-526-2278 if I am what you’re looking for!!  I look forward to meeting you and your kiddos! Thanks so much!

Position/Role: I am a mature single Indian South African woman. I am seeking a long term live in position as a Maternity Nurse/Nanny abroad. English is my first language. I have 15 years experience from New born to Toddler age. I recently completed a 3 month contract caring for a new born. I would like to apply for the position: Travelling Live-in Maternity Nurse in Riyadh, Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Ad reference: 1373LDM. I am a professional person with sober habits who is confident, calm, kind, patient and gentle person who loves looking after children. I believe it is important to surround a child with love, a positive attitude and creative environment to nurture their young minds. I enjoy teaching, reading, singing nursery rhymes to children and being creative with art. I possess excellent leadership skills and am highly competent at problem solving and ensure that children are guided to reach their milestone. I easily adapt to any given situation. I have experience with all nursery duties; travelling with babies, packing and unpacking, organizing, infant/new born care, health and safety in and around the home. I am flexible and work well within a team. I am able to start work in January 2022. I have a nanny and child care certificate, a first aid and CPR certificate. I have a certificate from the South African Police Service Criminal Database that confirms I have no previous convictions. I have a passport, ID document and drivers license. I also have written references.
